# Research Card Catalogue

Cards track decisions, findings, specs, and context that must persist across sessions. When a card is referenced by ID, read its content before proceeding with related work.

## Active Cards

| ID | Topic | Status | Depends On | Next Action |
|----|-------|--------|------------|-------------|
| CARD-XXX | <Topic Title> | Draft / Approved / In Progress / Verified / Done | — | <what to do next> |

## Status Legend

- **Draft** — Initial research phase, scope being defined
- **Approved** — Ready to implement, verification plan clear
- **In Progress** — Feature branch created, work underway
- **Verified** — HEADLESS_TEST passed, Godot verification complete
- **Done** — Squash-merged to main, CHANGELOG updated
- **Reverted** — Work undone; CHANGELOG entry documents reasoning

## Archived Cards

| ID | Topic | Status | Replaced By |
|----|-------|--------|-------------|
| CARD-XXX | <Topic Title> | Done / Reverted | CARD-YYY (if applicable) |
